headlines.title: Supreme Court rejects Virginia Democrats’ attempt to revive new congressional map
headlines.description: The decision leaves in place a Virginia Supreme Court ruling that concluded the process leading up to a referendum approving a new congressional map was flawed.

headlines.title: Election denier Tina Peters set for release after Colorado governor commutes sentence
headlines.description: Democratic Gov. Jared Polis had previously called Peters’ 9-year prison sentence “harsh.” President Trump has repeatedly demanded she be released.

headlines.title: Trump’s flavored vape push sparks backlash from some MAHA influencers and federal officials
headlines.description: The Trump administration’s moves to make flavored vapes more widely available have caused a splintering among some in the MAHA movement and some federal health officials.

headlines.title: U.S. will 'stand firm' if China continues to be ‘belligerent’ on Taiwan: House Republican
headlines.description: Rep. Zach Nunn (R-Iowa), a member of the House Select Committee on the Chinese Communist Party, joins Meet the Press NOW following President Trump’s state visit to China.

headlines.title: Fmr. government watchdog says Trump stock trades are ‘completely unprecedented’
headlines.description: NBC News Senior National Political Reporter Jonathan Allen and Don Fox, former acting director and general counsel of the U.S. Office of Government Ethics, join Meet the Press NOW to discuss the new scrutiny the White House is facing after President Trump revealed hundreds of millions of dollars in stock purchases and financial transactions. Some include private companies he personally helped broker potentially lucrative deals for.

headlines.title: Thomas Massie calls his primary 'a national referendum' as he faces Trump-backed challenger
headlines.description: Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) speaks with NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin ahead of his primary election on Tuesday, where he’s facing Trump-backed challenger Ed Gallrein. Kadia Goba, Chuck Rocha and Matt Gorman join the Meet the Press NOW roundtable.

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the U.S., it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Trump’s China trips ends with more questions than answers: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Kristen Welker wraps up President Donald Trump’s trip to China. Plus, we look ahead to next Tuesday’s key Republican Senate primary in Georgia.

headlines.title: Speaker Mike Johnson responds to domestic abuse allegations against a GOP congressman: ‘He’s got to work that out’
headlines.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson weighed in on domestic abuse allegations Rep. Max Miller’s ex-wife Emily Moreno has made in their divorce, saying “he’s got to work that out.”

headlines.title: DOJ pushing to indict Raúl Castro over 1996 downing of civilian planes, officials say
headlines.description: The Justice Department is pushing to indict 94-year-old Raúl Castro, the former president of Cuba, according to two U.S. officials familiar with the matter.

headlines.title: Trump leaves China with no agreement on thorny issues, but cites ‘very good’ talks with Xi
headlines.description: Though U.S. President Donald Trump said he and Chinese President Xi Jinping “discussed almost everything,” their Beijing summit produced no sweeping agreements.
